results.node_summary: Node 1 [failed]: No usable emails found on priority website pages | Node 2 [failed]: theHarvester did not return usable email candidates | Node 3 [failed]: Sherlock did not return email or LinkedIn candidates | Node 4 [failed]: AI could not identify a clear decision-maker name | Node 5 [skipped]: Skipped because no decision-maker name was available | Node 6 [failed]: WHOIS returned no usable decision-maker email | Node 7 [failed]: Public search did not find a LinkedIn profile | Node 8 [skipped]: Skipped because no LinkedIn profile was available | Node 9 [failed]: SpiderFoot returned no usable emails | Node 11 [skipped]: Skipped because no matched decision-maker email was found
